exploration_notes: Generated comprehensive Javadoc for all three target classes in Kafka's record batch serialization layer. RecordBatch interface received enhanced class-level docs covering protocol role, magic versions, and thread-safety, plus improved offsetOfMaxTimestamp() docs. DefaultRecordBatch received thread-safety and performance notes at class level, plus @param/@return/@throws on all public methods including iterator(), streamingIterator(), skipKeyValueIterator(), writeHeader(), writeEmptyHeader(), and
